text:
The Lakers game will settle once the official result is confirmed — that's usually within a few minutes of the final whistle, but can take longer if there's overtime, a protest, or any other review that delays the official data feed.

I can't give you a specific time, since it depends on how the game plays out. Once it's official, your position settles automatically.

If your bet doesn't settle within a reasonable window after the game ends, let us know and we'll check what's holding it up.

Novig Support
